    Whole Home Refresh

    Create a space that is uniquely yours. Find the perfect design for you.

    Shop WallpaperShop Fabric

    Spoonflower offers fabric, wallpaper and home decor, made to order using unique designs from independent artists worldwide.

    What's New With Spoonflower

    Spoonflower x Home on Broad

    Greer Gagnier's blended colors, patterns, and textures to create a beautiful synergy in a full bedroom makeover.

    Explore the Collaboration

    Spoonflower x Gabriela Fasola

    Gabriela Fasola mixes and matches soft, gentle floral designs to create elegant and cozy handmade clothing.

    Exlpore the Collaboration

    Spoonflower x Whitney McGregor

    In a recent project, Interior Designer Whitney McGregor utilized Spoonflower fabric, wallpaper, and home decor to create a charming pattern-drenched bedroom retreat.

    Explore The Collection

    Why Spoonflower?

    The World's Largest Design Library for Wallpaper and Textiles

    Discover a world of design—from minimalist to maximalist. Thousands of global artists, with new styles added constantly. 

    Shop All Designs

    Custom Designs on Any Item

    Our made-to-order model lets you print any design on any material. Coordinate patterns across rooms for a cohesive, personalized home.

    How It Works

    Premium Materials, Always in Stock

    Trusted by pros and loved by enthusiasts, our responsibly sourced textiles and papers offer the perfect finish—from smooth to textured, delicate to durable.

    About Us

    Printed on Demand in the USA

    Our print-on-demand model lets you choose your design, material, and quantity—minimizing waste with non-toxic inks and reduced packaging.
